description: Update /home/ga/Documents/batch_synthesis_report.odt by replacing the '[INSERT YIELD DATA HERE]' placeholder in Section 3.0 with an embedded spreadsheet object. The spreadsheet must contain a table with headers 'Batch ID', 'Input Mass (kg)', 'Output Mass (kg)', and 'Yield %' for the following batches: Batch A (50.0kg input, 42.5kg output), Batch B (48.5kg input, 39.2kg output), and Batch C (52.0kg input, 49.8kg output). Calculate the 'Yield %' for each batch using a formula and format the results to one decimal place. Save the final document to /home/ga/Documents/batch_synthesis_report_complete.odt.
